title: pomaderris coomingalensis
intro: Pomaderris coomingalensis, also known as the Coominga or Coomingal, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae. It is native to eastern Australia and has been used by indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties for centuries. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Pomaderris coomingalensis can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
